title: Rewrite your backend for 5G users or lose half your
meta_description: Reduce 5G backend failures by 68% with a 120-line shim, latency budgets, and jittered retries. Learn what to measure first and which dials actually move the needle.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams burn weeks tweaking TCP buffers before realizing 5G hand-offs wreck their latency.

A 120-line Node.js shim cut 5xx errors by 68%.
